words.zh: n. 比賽, 火柴, 對手
n. 大量, 許多, 重要的事

words.def: temporary living quarters specially built by the army for soldiers
a legal document codifying the result of deliberations of a committee or society or legislative body
words.zh: n. 行動, 行為, 幕, 法案
n. 切口, 割傷, 降低, 切, 割, 砍, 削, 傷口, 削減, 縮短, 刪節, 通路

words.def: a small open container usually used for drinking; usually has a handle
words.zh: n. 杯子, 茶杯, 優勝杯

words.def: the option to sell a given stock (or stock index or commodity future) at a given price before a given date
words.zh: vt. 放, 擺, 安置, 移動, 發射, 投擲, 寫上, 表達, 使從事, 使受到, 驅使, 賦予
